name: LLM Content Block

releases.author: slow-coding
releases.description:
## 0.1.1

Fixes from the Obsidian plugin review (same features as 0.1.0):

- Settings heading via `Setting.setHeading()` instead of raw `<h3>`
- Textarea styles via CSS class instead of inline static styles
- Type-safe settings load (`loadData()` cast)
- Removed unnecessary regex escape
- Caught a floating promise in the render loop
- Release assets trimmed to `main.js` / `manifest.json` / `styles.css`

### Manual install
Download the 3 files into `<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/llm-content-block/`, then enable in **Settings → Community plugins**.
releases.name: 0.1.1 — review fixes

releases.author: slow-coding
releases.description:
## LLM Content Block 0.1.0

Paste AI conversations into Obsidian as **scrollable, format-safe cards** — their markdown stays contained, your notes stay clean.

### Features
- `aicard` code block → scrollable glass card
- Role-aware bubbles (user / AI); source pill with 12 preset models (GPT / Gemini / Claude / DeepSeek / Qwen / ERNIE / Kimi / Doubao / Gemma / GLM / Grok / Llama) + custom
- Full markdown / LaTeX / code support; long AI answers collapse by default
- In-place edit modal; "Insert AI chat block" command + hotkey
- Theme-aware (CSS variables, dark/light auto); i18n (follows Obsidian locale)

### Manual install
Download `manifest.json`, `versions.json`, `main.js`, `styles.css` into:
`<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/llm-content-block/`
Then enable it in **Settings → Community plugins**.
releases.name: 0.1.0 — initial release
